basicVocabulary.title: Basic Vocabulary Cards
basicVocabulary.description: Start with essential Greek words and phrases. Build your foundation with everyday vocabulary.

themedVocabulary.title: Themed Vocabulary Cards
themedVocabulary.description: From A1 foundations to specialized topics - master words for real estate, medical visits, banking, and everyday conversations.

customCards.title: Custom Cards & Decks
customCards.description: Create your own flashcards and organize them into custom decks. Learn the words that matter most to you.

nounForms.title: Noun Forms & Cases
nounForms.description: Master articles, plural/singular forms, and noun cases like accusative and genitive - essential for speaking correctly.

verbConjugations.title: Verb Conjugations
verbConjugations.description: Practice verb forms across all persons. I, we, you, and all other forms.

verbTenses.title: Verb Tenses
verbTenses.description: Learn past, present, and future forms of verbs. See how the same verb changes across different time contexts.

realNews.title: Real News Practice
realNews.description: Learn from actual Greek and Cyprus TV, radio, newspaper and bloggers. Immerse yourself in authentic content.

audioDialogs.title: Real Audio Dialogs
audioDialogs.description: Practice with authentic conversations - ordering coffee, visiting the doctor, talking to your landlord. No synthetic textbook scripts.

historyCulture.title: History & Culture Questions
historyCulture.description: Prepare for the citizenship exam history and culture section with curated questions about Cypriot heritage and traditions.

listeningExercises.title: Listening Exercises
listeningExercises.description: Test your comprehension with fill-the-gap, "select what you heard", and true/false exercises based on real Greek conversations.

ellinomatheia.title: Ellinomatheia Exam Practice
ellinomatheia.description: Simulate the official Greek language certification exam with timed sections and real exam-format questions.

readingComprehension.title: Reading Comprehension
readingComprehension.description: Read short Greek stories and situations, then answer comprehension questions to build your reading confidence.

faq.label: COMMON QUESTIONS
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Greekly and the citizenship exam

exam.question: What is the Cypriot citizenship language exam?
exam.answer: The Cypriot citizenship language exam tests your ability to communicate in Greek at a B1 or B2 level (depending on your application category). It includes reading comprehension, writing, listening, and speaking sections. You will need to demonstrate that you can handle everyday situations, understand main points of clear texts, and express yourself on familiar topics.

level.question: What level of Greek do I need to pass?
level.answer: Most applicants need to demonstrate B1 level proficiency, which means you can understand the main points of clear standard input on familiar matters. Some categories may require B2 level. Greekly covers vocabulary and grammar from A1 through B2 to ensure you are fully prepared.

difference.question: How is Greekly different from other language apps?
difference.answer: Greekly is built specifically for the Cypriot citizenship exam. Unlike general language apps, we focus on the vocabulary, grammar, and cultural knowledge you will actually be tested on. Our content includes themed vocabulary for real-life situations (banking, medical visits, bureaucracy), history and culture questions, and authentic audio from Greek media.

customCards.question: Can I create my own flashcards?
customCards.answer: Yes! With our Custom Cards & Decks feature, you can create your own flashcards and organize them into personalized decks. This is perfect for words you encounter in daily life, terms from your specific profession, or areas where you need extra practice.

prepTime.question: How long does it take to prepare for the exam?
prepTime.answer: Preparation time varies based on your starting level. If you are starting from zero, plan for 6-12 months of consistent study. If you already have some Greek knowledge, 3-6 months of focused practice may be sufficient. We recommend 20-30 minutes of daily practice for best results.

freePlan.question: What is included in the Free plan?
freePlan.answer: The Free plan includes access to basic A1 vocabulary cards, limited daily practice sessions, progress tracking, and community access. It is a great way to get started and see if Greekly is right for you before upgrading to Premium.

monthlyVsYearly.question: What is the difference between the plans?
monthlyVsYearly.answer: All paid plans include full access to all features: complete vocabulary from A1-B2, unlimited practice, all grammar exercises, real news and audio content, and history/culture questions. The Quarterly plan (€129) saves you 12% compared to paying monthly, while the Semi-Annual plan (€249) offers the best value at 15% savings.

foundersEdition.question: What is the Semi-Annual plan?
foundersEdition.answer: The Semi-Annual plan is €249 for 6 months of full access to Greekly, including all features and priority support. At approximately €41.50 per month, it offers the best value of all our plans. It includes early access to new features and priority support.

refundPolicy.question: What is your refund policy?
refundPolicy.answer: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans, no questions asked. If Greekly is not the right fit for you, simply contact us within 14 days of your purchase for a full refund.

offline.question: Can I use Greekly offline?
offline.answer: Offline mode is coming soon for Quarterly and Semi-Annual plan members. This will allow you to download vocabulary decks and practice without an internet connection - perfect for studying on your commute or when traveling.

founder.text: Built by someone actively preparing for the same exam you are taking. I understand the journey because I am on it too.
founder.author: Greekly Founder

mariaK.author: Maria K.

georgeM.author: George M.
